/usr/bin/ar qc libvideo.a CMakeFiles/video.dir/artpack.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/explosion.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/fonts.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/gamegraphics.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/graphics_fx.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/graphics_hud.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/graphics_lights.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/graphics_utility.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/graphics_world.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/hud.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/level.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/material.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/model.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/recognizer.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/screenshot.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/skybox.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/texture.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/trail.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/trail_geometry.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/trail_render.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/trails_buffered.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/video.c.o CMakeFiles/video.dir/visuals_2d.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libvideo.a
